content.text:
Now I have a clear view of atom 17 (O:17). From this zoomed-in image, I can see that the oxygen atom O:17 is connected to:
- C:16 (carbon atom with index 16) - shown as a yellow sphere connected by a bond
- H:36 (hydrogen atom with index 36) - shown as a white sphere connected by a bond

The oxygen atom O:17 has exactly two covalent bonds, forming what appears to be a hydroxyl group (-OH) attached to carbon C:16.

Based on the file name "geomconf_2358.xyz", the geomconf_index for this molecule is 2358.

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom 17 (O) are:
- Atom index 16, element C (carbon)
- Atom index 36, element H (hydrogen)

And the geomconf_index is 2358.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 17, whose element should be O. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
